name_en: WALLET ON CHAIN IVY #M81911# Uninspected Version
name_cn:
WALLET ON CHAIN IVY #M81911# Uninspected Version
▪️Size: 23.5*12*4.3cm▪️
A major best-seller from the Fa Fa series, the Ivy WOC is a refined and chic style. The double-chain design allows for both shoulder and crossbody wear. With various exquisite and stylish elements, it is a must-have for all four seasons. In terms of looks, it is a stunningly designed masterpiece!
